items.title: Investigate and fix the 8 failing tests from cycle 4424e214
items.description: Active failures block the v10.7.0 release gate and corrupt the autonomous loop's feedback signal. Fix or delete with documented rationale before any new development proceeds.

items.title: Run svelte-check on packages/dashboard and fix every type error
items.description: Known MODEL_TIERS undefined errors suppress real compile errors in CI. Resolving all type errors before dashboard work begins prevents regressions from hiding behind pre-existing lint noise.

items.title: Define memory entry schema in packages/core/src/memory/types.ts with writeMemoryEntry helper
items.description: Gates five downstream memory items. Nothing in the memory subsystem can proceed safely without this foundational type definition and file-lock write helper.

items.title: Delete the legacy root Fastify server at src/server/main.ts and src/server/server.ts
items.description: The trunk of the convergence debt tree. Removing it unblocks six downstream purge items and eliminates the risk of accidental traffic routing to stale handlers.

items.title: Migrate root src/autonomous/ into packages/core/src/autonomous/ and delete root directory
items.description: Breaking migration that consolidates the autonomous runtime and unblocks the stubs audit. Higher cost reflects enumerating and updating every test import site. Behavioral divergence here degrades the entire feedback loop.

items.title: Remove src/server/routes/flywheel.ts and src/server/routes/search.ts root duplicates
items.description: Mechanical delete after root server purge. Canonical replacements exist in packages/server. Prevents accidental import resolution against deleted root server paths.

items.title: Delete deprecated root dashboard at dashboard/index.html and dashboard/pages/
items.description: Eliminates operator confusion between root and SvelteKit dashboards. Land immediately after root server purge so no reference path survives.

items.title: Wire review phase handler to write memory entries of type=review-finding for MAJOR/CRITICAL findings
items.description: First consumer of the memory schema. Writing review findings is the seed event for cross-cycle learning — without it, successive cycles remain blind to recurring audit patterns.

items.title: Fix /api/v5/memory backend to read .agentforge/memory/*.jsonl with filtering and descending sort
items.description: Blocking dependency for memory dashboard page, flywheel stats card, and integration test. Must serve the new JSONL format before any consumer can render live data.

items.title: Audit src/cli/commands/* against packages/cli/src/commands/* and disposition each command
items.description: Unblocks compat bridge removal, invoke --loop consolidation, and deprecation warning injection. The disposition log is required to safely delete vs. shim each root CLI command.

items.title: Complete /runner route — fix MODEL_TIERS errors, wire agent dispatch form, show streaming output
items.description: MODEL_TIERS compile errors overlap with the svelte-check pass but dispatch-form wiring and streaming output are separate work. High operator value for triggering manual cycles without CLI.

items.title: Fix /org dashboard route — verify org graph endpoint returns real delegation data
items.description: Core operator visualization for agent topology currently broken or empty. Fixing it provides immediate insight into team delegation structure.

items.title: Fix /agents dashboard route — show real agents from .agentforge/agents/*.yaml with detail pages
items.description: Broken agent list hides team composition from operators and makes capacity planning impossible. Fix is likely straightforward once the YAML file-read path is corrected.

items.title: Wire /approvals page to GET/POST /api/v5/cycles/:id/approval with SSE-triggered global ApprovalModal
items.description: Critical human-in-the-loop control surface. Server endpoints already exist; this is dashboard wiring plus the global modal. Higher cost reflects SSE integration, polling, and partial-approval checkbox UX.

items.title: Render markdown in cycle phases tab using marked or markdown-it
items.description: Raw JSON in phases tab degrades readability of reviewer responses and gate rationales. Small library install and targeted render update — low risk, immediate UX return.

items.title: Wire /memory dashboard page to real backend — render live entries with search and agent filter
items.description: Connects the static page to the live JSONL feed after memory backend is fixed at rank 9. Search and agent filter are essential as memory volume grows.

items.title: Update packages/dashboard/src/routes/memory/+page.svelte with type chips, source links, and expandable entries
items.description: Frontend complement to rank 16. Should run in the same session to avoid double-touch conflicts on the route file.

items.title: Fix /search dashboard route — implement backend or wire to existing sessions/cycles/agents endpoints
items.description: Zero results regardless of query is high-visibility breakage that undermines operator trust. Straightforward once the correct backend target is identified.

items.title: Wire /flywheel page to real data — compute meta-learning rate, autonomy score, and velocity from cycles
items.description: Static gauges hide the actual autonomy trajectory. Computing real metrics closes the operator feedback loop for tuning the cycle. Higher cost due to multi-source aggregation logic.

items.title: Audit packages/cli/src/commands/autonomous.ts stubs and replace with real adapters from packages/core
items.description: Stubbed adapters cause CLI autonomous:cycle to diverge from the server cycle — a silent behavioral split that corrupts the feedback loop. Parity between CLI and server is required for reliable autonomous operation.

items.title: Verify /live activity feed renders cycle_event SSE messages with correct colors and timestamps
items.description: Low-cost verification with high operator situational-awareness value. If SSE is wired, this is a smoke test; if not, it surfaces a real gap cheaply.

items.title: Add memory stats card to /flywheel page — total entries, per-cycle trend, and memory hit rate
items.description: Extends flywheel with memory-specific observability after rank 9 and 19 land. Memory hit rate is a novel metric that directly measures cross-cycle learning effectiveness.

items.title: Complete /branches tab — show autonomous/* branches with cycle, age, PR status, and stale-delete button
items.description: Branch lifecycle visibility prevents stale autonomous branches from accumulating and consuming CI. The delete button provides a practical operator action without requiring CLI access.

items.title: Verify /sprints/[version] detail page renders kanban, success criteria, audit findings, and completion %
items.description: Described as mostly built — low-cost gap fill. Completing the sprint detail view is important for post-cycle retrospectives and sprint health monitoring.

items.title: Remove src/cli/compat/* bridges — inline direct package-core imports and delete bridge modules
items.description: Compat bridges exist only to soften migration. Once CLI audit at rank 10 is complete, these add only indirection. Removal reduces the import graph and eliminates a maintenance surface.

items.title: Consolidate root invoke --loop placeholder — wire end-to-end or delete and update --help text
items.description: A dead --loop flag misleads operators into believing the loop is invokable from the root CLI. Either wire it or remove it to eliminate the confusion before the convergence purge completes.

items.title: Pin Node version in .nvmrc and align engines.node across all packages/*/package.json
items.description: Version drift is a known G5 risk surface. High confidence, very low cost, prevents subtle runtime differences between packages from appearing in production.

items.title: Fix src/index.ts plugin export version string — read from package.json or delete if unused
items.description: Stale 0.1.0 version string creates operator confusion and breaks tooling that inspects plugin version. Trivial two-line fix with high confidence.

items.title: Add version banner to SvelteKit dashboard showing current package version and CHANGELOG link
items.description: Single-source-of-truth fix for G5 from the operator side. Trivial layout component addition that surfaces version context on every operator session.

items.title: Add stderr deprecation warnings to root CLI commands that delegate to package — gate behind flag for tests
items.description: Guides operators toward canonical commands during the transition window before root CLI removal. Feature-flagged to prevent test spam. Low risk, low cost, high signal value.
